raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/auth.py", "what_exists": "Authentication endpoints with rate limiting and validation", "what_it_does": "Handles user registration, login, and authentication with Supabase Auth, including GDPR Art. 7/8 and AZ PDPA consent capture", "quality_assessment": "Generally well-structured, but some complex logic and potential security concerns"}], "summary": "The authentication endpoints appear to be well-structured, but require closer examination for potential security issues and Constitution compliance", "next_files_to_read": ["docs/research/gdpr-article-22/summary.md", "apps/api/app/schemas/assessment.py"], "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.what_exists: Authentication endpoints with rate limiting and validation

summary: The authentication endpoints appear to be well-structured, but require closer examination for potential security issues and Constitution compliance
